steps.t: The boots needed for stomping on shrews can be found near the stairs of the Festival Garden. You should collect the boots from the crate and drag them…
Pesky shrews can be found in the centre space of Duillond's Festival Garden. You should locate the boots in your inventory and slot them as a skill. T…
Brangloth awaits you in the Festival Garden of Duillond. You should speak with Brangloth of your success against the pesky shrews.
